title: How to Use the ASR Outdoor Mini Rubber Pocket Sluice Box
body: The 12-inch mini rubber sluice box is portable, lightweight, and designed for fine gold recovery in the field. In this quick demo, see how the pocket-sized 3-riffle TPR mat traps fine gold flakes, and how to carry it on a rucksack for prospecting on the go.
meta_title: How to Use the Mini Rubber Pocket Sluice Box
meta_description: Watch how ASR Outdoor's 12-inch mini rubber pocket sluice box traps fine gold in the field — portable, lightweight, and ideal for on-the-go prospecting.

title: Large-Capacity Rock Hounding Tool Bag
body: A quick look at the ASR Outdoor large-capacity rock hounding tool bag. With multiple compartments and plenty of room, it carries all your rockhounding gear, found specimens, and personal belongings so you stay organized on the hunt.
meta_title: Large-Capacity Rock Hounding Tool Bag
meta_description: See the ASR Outdoor large-capacity rock hounding tool bag — multiple compartments to carry your tools, specimens, and gear organized on every hunt.

title: How to Choose the Correct Gold Pan for Gold Panning
body: Not sure which type or size of gold pan is right for you? This guide walks through the different gold pan types, sizes, and riffle zones so you can pick the best pan for each excursion and recover more fine gold and nuggets.
meta_title: How to Choose the Correct Gold Pan
meta_description: Learn how to choose the right gold pan type and size for gold panning — riffle zones, pan sizes, and which pan works best for each excursion.

title: How to Use 6-Inch Classifier Screens for Gold Panning
body: Classifying paydirt is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting. See how ASR Outdoor's 6-inch stainless mesh classifier screens sort raw material by size so fine gold isn't lost during panning and sluicing.
meta_title: How to Use 6-Inch Classifier Screens
meta_description: Watch how to use ASR Outdoor's 6-inch classifier screens to sift and sort paydirt by size — an essential first step for efficient gold panning.

title: The Best Shovels, Hammers & Picks for Gold Prospecting
body: A rundown of the best digging tools for gold prospecting — from a 28-inch shovel and collapsible shovels to compact pick axes and a rock pick hammer. Find the right tool to reach and break up paydirt for your goals.
meta_title: Best Shovels, Hammers & Picks for Prospecting
meta_description: Compare the best shovels, pick axes, and rock hammers for gold prospecting, from full-size to collapsible tools, and find the right dig tool for you.

title: ASR Outdoor 30-Inch Plastic Sluice Box Setup & Features
body: See the setup and features of ASR Outdoor's 30-inch high-impact ABS plastic sluice box. Lightweight, unibody, and no assembly required, with carabiners for a shoulder strap — a great sluice for prospectors of all levels.
meta_title: 30-Inch Plastic Sluice Box Setup & Features
meta_description: Setup and features of the ASR Outdoor 30-inch plastic sluice box — lightweight, no assembly, and built for prospectors of every level.

title: How to Use 13-Inch Bucket Classifier Sifting Pans
body: These 13-inch stackable bucket classifier screens sit on a bucket to sort unclassified paydirt into finer, workable material. Learn how proper classification by size makes gold panning, sluicing, and high-banking far more efficient.
meta_title: How to Use 13-Inch Bucket Classifier Pans
meta_description: Learn how to use ASR Outdoor's 13-inch bucket classifier sifting pans to sort paydirt by size for faster, more efficient gold recovery.

title: How to Use the ASR Outdoor 12-Inch Aluminum Sluice Box
body: The 12-inch aluminum sluice box is ideal for sluicing smaller amounts of classified paydirt and capturing fine gold flakes and flour. See how the V-groove rubber matting traps fine gold — perfect for the field, home cleanup, or beginners.
meta_title: How to Use the 12-Inch Aluminum Sluice Box
meta_description: Watch how to use ASR Outdoor's 12-inch aluminum sluice box with V-groove rubber matting to capture fine gold flakes from classified paydirt.

title: Unboxing the 12pc Break Your Own Geodes Kit
body: A full look at the ASR Outdoor 12-piece Break Your Own Geodes Kit — 10 real geodes, a sledge hammer, and safety goggles. See how to safely break them open and the crystals hidden inside. A fun, educational activity for all ages.
meta_title: Unboxing the Break Your Own Geodes Kit
meta_description: Unboxing ASR Outdoor's 12pc Break Your Own Geodes Kit — 10 geodes, sledge hammer, and goggles. See how to safely crack them and the crystals inside.

title: Waterproof First Aid Kit — Full Submersion Test
body: Can a first aid kit survive full water submersion? Watch the test. This waterproof, buoyant 50-piece kit packs into a durable hard case with a carabiner to attach to your pack — first aid essentials that stay dry outdoors.
meta_title: Waterproof First Aid Kit Submersion Test
meta_description: Watch ASR Outdoor's 50-piece waterproof first aid kit take a full submersion test — buoyant, hard-cased, and ready to clip to your pack.

title: ASR Outdoor 50-Inch Folding Sluice Box Setup
body: Learn how to set up the best-selling 50-inch aluminum folding sluice box. Its long run-out and wide flare mouth fold down to just 15 inches to fit a backpack or 5-gallon bucket — great for hikers, adventurers, and serious prospectors.
meta_title: 50-Inch Folding Sluice Box Setup
meta_description: Step-by-step setup of ASR Outdoor's 50-inch aluminum folding sluice box — long run-out, wide mouth, and folds down to fit a backpack or bucket.

title: Sluice Box Setup Basics & Rubber Matting Cleanup
body: Learn the basics of setting up a sluice box and how to clean up your rubber riffle matting after running paydirt. See how the Hungarian, V-shape, and square riffle patterns in TPR matting trap different sizes of gold and material.
meta_title: Sluice Box Setup Basics & Matting Cleanup
meta_description: Learn sluice box setup basics and how to clean rubber riffle matting after running paydirt — plus how each riffle pattern traps gold.

title: Cracking Open Rocks by the River with a Rock Pick
body: Watch us break open river rocks with a 3-piece chisel set and a 20oz rock pick hammer, searching for agates, crystals, and hidden gems. A look at ASR Outdoor rock hounding gear in action out in the field.
meta_title: Cracking Open Rocks by the River
meta_description: Watch ASR Outdoor break open river rocks with a rock pick hammer and chisel set, hunting for agates and crystals — rock hounding gear in action.

title: Top Magnetic Prospecting Pick Axe for Gold Panning
body: A look at ASR Outdoor's compact magnetic prospector's pick axe, tested in the field. The built-in magnet lets you separate black-sand magnetite and clear your dig site fast — a handy tool for any gold prospecting kit.
meta_title: Magnetic Prospecting Pick Axe for Gold Panning
meta_description: See ASR Outdoor's compact magnetic prospector's pick axe tested in the field — the built-in magnet clears black sand and speeds up digging.

title: Benefits of Rubber Riffle Matting for Gold Recovery
body: Learn how rubber riffle matting boosts your gold capture rate. The TPR mat's riffle traps hold fine gold flakes and nuggets while offering clear visibility, making it a great add-on for fine gold recovery in any sluice box.
meta_title: Benefits of Rubber Riffle Matting
meta_description: Learn how ASR Outdoor's rubber riffle matting increases gold capture — TPR riffle traps hold fine gold and nuggets with clear visibility.

title: How to Properly Season Your Gold Pans
body: New gold pans need seasoning before use. Join ASR Outdoor brand ambassador Bobby Bo to learn how to properly season plastic and metal gold pans so they shed water and catch more fine gold, and how the sidewall riffles help.
meta_title: How to Properly Season Your Gold Pans
meta_description: Learn how to season plastic and metal gold pans before use with Bobby Bo, so they shed water and catch more fine gold on every pan.

title: ASR Outdoor Gemstone Paydirt Kit — Find Crystals & Gems
body: A look at ASR Outdoor's gemstone paydirt kits. Sift and sort each curated batch to uncover a variety of real gemstones — a fun, educational family activity and a unique gift for any gem enthusiast.
meta_title: Gemstone Paydirt Kit — Find Crystals & Gems
meta_description: See ASR Outdoor's gemstone paydirt kits — sift and sort to uncover real gemstones. A fun, educational family activity and a great gift.

title: Product Spotlight: 21pc Geology Rock Hounding Kit
body: A spotlight on the ASR Outdoor 21-piece Geology Rock Hounding Kit. It packs a 3-piece hardened steel chisel set, rock pick hammer, 2-in-1 shovel, and more into a durable large-capacity bag — everything you need for your next expedition.
meta_title: 21pc Geology Rock Hounding Kit Spotlight
meta_description: A spotlight on ASR Outdoor's 21pc Geology Rock Hounding Kit — chisels, rock pick hammer, shovel, and more in one durable large-capacity bag.

title: ASR Outdoor 34-Inch Aluminum Sluice Box Setup
body: Learn how to set up ASR Outdoor's 34.5-inch aluminum sluice box with preinstalled TPR rubber matting. The rust-free body and included shoulder strap make gold recovery simple and portable — experiment with angle and water speed for the best yield.
meta_title: 34-Inch Aluminum Sluice Box Setup
meta_description: Step-by-step setup of ASR Outdoor's 34-inch aluminum sluice box with preinstalled rubber matting — rust-free, portable, and ready for gold recovery.

title: 6pc Beginner Gold Panning Kit with Paydirt Demo
body: A demo of the ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo 6-piece beginner gold panning kit with paydirt. Watch the panning basics — smooth-wall technique, the swirl, and finding gold — a perfect starting point and family activity for new prospectors.
meta_title: 6pc Beginner Gold Panning Kit with Paydirt
meta_description: Watch a demo of ASR Outdoor's 6pc beginner gold panning kit with paydirt — panning basics, the swirl technique, and finding gold. Great for beginners.
